title: Bitter Crumbly Filipino Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty Filipino casserole that balances the sharp bite of chili powder with a satisfying crumbly crust, perfect for meal prep and Mediterranean-friendly diets.

ingredients.name: shredded cheese blend (mozzarella 150g + feta 50g)
ingredients.notes: mix mozzarella and feta for creamy yet crumbly texture

instructions: In a bowl, toss chicken with chili powder, smoked paprika, coriander, cumin, salt, and pepper. Let marinate 5 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat. Add chicken and brown for 5–7 minutes, removing from pan once golden.
Add diced onion and minced garlic to the pan; sauté until onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Return chicken to the skillet, pour in chicken broth, and stir in the shredded cheese blend and lemon juice. Simmer for 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a greased 9×13 inch baking dish and top with a layer of crushed cornflakes. If desired, add a thin layer of extra shredded cheese on top.
Bake uncovered for 20–25 minutes, or until the top is golden and the casserole is bubbling.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Store leftover portions in airtight containers in the refrigerator for up to 4 days, reheating in the microwave or oven.
